photos.title: 张掖丹霞国家地质公园 (Parque geológico nacional Zhangye Danxia)
photos.commonsTitle: File:张掖丹霞国家地质公园 (Parque geológico nacional Zhangye Danxia).jpg
photos.description: Zhangye Danxia, located in Gansu Province, China, is one of the most representative danxia landscapes in the arid northern regions of the country. Its uniqueness lies in the stratified hills that, under sunlight, display shades of red, yellow, orange, and green, like a palette of colors spread across the mountains. This geological phenomenon was formed during the Cretaceous period (135-65 million years ago), when sedimentary sandstones and minerals, following tectonic movements and erosion, acquired these vibrant swathes of color. Declared a World Geological Park and a national landscape area, it has viewpoints from which to contemplate the chromatic spectacle at sunrise and sunset, representing a natural landmark on the Silk Road.

photos.title: VM 4663 Wuhan Shahu
photos.description: A view of the Shahu ("Sand Lake"), located just northeast of downtown Wuchang. Looking from the south shore in the roughly northern direction. High-rises on the other side are probably in Youyi Dadao (Friendship Ave.) and Heping Dadao (Peace Ave.), which run between the lake and the Yangtze River

photos.title: 天山山脉西段航拍 / West Tian Shan mountains
Taihang mountains north outlier IMG 4110 Huai'an co, Zhangjiakou, Hebei - Tianzhen co, Datong, Shanxi
photos.commonsTitle: File:Taihang mountains north outlier IMG 4110 Huai'an co, Zhangjiakou, Hebei - Tianzhen co, Datong, Shanxi.jpg
photos.description: An outlier mountain massif outlier far North in the Taihang mountain range, on the border between Hebei (foreground) and Shanxi (background). The < 2000 m peak in the image represents the extreme northeastern point of Shanxi province (Tianzhen county). The Hebei parts in the front are in Huai'an county.

photos.title: 喀纳斯湖
photos.description: Lake Kanas in Xinjiang , western China

photos.title: 喀纳斯湖全景
photos.description: Q30028182：Kanas Lake is one of the five most beautiful Chinese lake, Lake 1374 meters above sea level. As the lake is 25 kilometres long, it is hard to take a look at the whole picture. Standing on the hill in west bank of the lake, north toward the widest section of the lake, sweeping the mountains across the lake, until the south end of the winding, almost covering the Lake District of 1/4. Nearby is Xinjiang spruces and firs, the distance is alpine meadow, coastal minority villages are distributed, cattle and sheep flocks in the pasture, the villagers are happy and healthy. It is the only area in China affected by the Arctic Ocean climate, so it has a special natural landscape.
